records.question: Which companies headquartered in the Netherlands with main industry Oil and gas, named Royal Dutch Shell, have sales of at least 470.2 billion and operate gas stations in Herne Hill managed by BrianWingrave that opened in 1998?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT company.company_id FROM company
JOIN station_company ON company.company_id = station_company.company_id
JOIN gas_station ON station_company.station_id = gas_station.station_id
WHERE company.headquarters = 'Netherlands' AND company.main_industry = 'Oil and gas' AND gas_station.location = 'Herne Hill' AND company.company = 'Royal Dutch Shell' AND gas_station.manager_name = 'BrianWingrave' AND company.sales_billion >= 470.2 AND gas_station.open_year = 1998
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Company_ID
FROM company c
JOIN station_company sc ON c.Company_ID = sc.Company_ID
JOIN gas_station gs ON sc.Station_ID = gs.Station_ID
WHERE c.Headquarters = 'Netherlands'
  AND c.Main_Industry = 'Oil and gas'
  AND c.Company = 'Royal Dutch Shell'
  AND c.Sales_billion >= 470.2
  AND gs.Location = 'Herne Hill'
  AND gs.Manager_Name = 'BrianWingrave'
  AND gs.Open_Year = 1998
